description: Real EcoComply partner portfolio — 22 SMEs, 53 products — IBM Bobathon 2025

partners.description: LumaNord Lighting GmbH manufactures NordBeam LED Panel 600, FlexGlow RGB Strip 5m and similar products for the EU market.
VoltEdge Power BV manufactures GaN USB-C Charger 65W, DeskDock USB-C Multiport and similar products for the EU market.
CellCore Energy Sp. z o.o. manufactures PowerBank 20k Portable, IndusCell 2.5kWh Module and similar products for the EU market.
SonicWave Audio SARL manufactures WaveGo Bluetooth Speaker, StudioPods Headphones and similar products for the EU market.
HomePulse Smart GmbH manufactures MotionSense Sensor, HomeHub Controller and similar products for the EU market.

FitTrack Wearables AB manufactures PulseBand Activity Tracker, SportWatch GPS and similar products for the EU market. Known compliance gaps: PulseBand wrist strap uses a PFAS/PFHxA water-repellent coating now restricted under REACH
MediBand Health AG manufactures CardioPatch Monitor, GlucoSense CGM Patch and similar products for the EU market.

PlayBright Toys S.r.l. manufactures RoboPup Interactive Toy, SingAlong Karaoke Mic and similar products for the EU market. Known compliance gaps: RoboPup soft plastic contains DEHP above the tightened toy chemical limit
CableMax Connect S.L. manufactures UltraLink USB-C Cable 2m, HDMI 2.1 Cable 3m and similar products for the EU market.

DisplayOne Visuals GmbH manufactures UltraView 27 Monitor, Legacy CCFL Panel (spare) and similar products for the EU market. Known compliance gaps: Legacy CCFL spare panel still contains mercury (RoHS restricted substance)
GridSense IoT BV manufactures EdgeNode Industrial Module, EdgeGateway 5G and similar products for the EU market.
SolarMicro Tech S.L. manufactures SunLink Micro-Inverter, HybridInverter Pro (Cd-free) and similar products for the EU market.

RideVolt Mobility GmbH manufactures e-Scooter Battery Pack 280Wh, eBike Battery 504Wh and similar products for the EU market. Known compliance gaps: e-Scooter LMT battery ships without an EU battery passport / data carrier
NetLink Systems Sp. z o.o. manufactures AirLink Wi-Fi 6 Router, MeshPoint Mini and similar products for the EU market.
BrewEasy Appliances S.r.l. manufactures QuickBoil Kettle 1.7L, ToastMaster 2-Slice and similar products for the EU market.
ChromaPrint 3D GmbH manufactures ChromaPrint X1 (EU), ChromaPrint X1 US Edition and similar products for the EU market.
AeroSense Drones SARL manufactures SkyScout Camera Drone, MicroDrone Mini and similar products for the EU market.
PureAir Devices BV manufactures FreshFlow Air Purifier, DryAir Dehumidifier and similar products for the EU market.
GlowToys Junior Sp. z o.o. manufactures StarLite Night Toy, MelodyPlush Toy and similar products for the EU market.
ThermoControl Industrie GmbH manufactures IndusTherm Controller, FlowMeter Industrial and similar products for the EU market.
NomadPower Outdoor AB manufactures TrailCell 512 Power Station, BaseCell 2.0kWh Industrial and similar products for the EU market.

KidVision Cams SARL manufactures LittleView Baby Monitor, KidCam Watch and similar products for the EU market. Known compliance gaps: LittleView baby monitor still uses a micro-USB charging port (USB-C common-charger rule)
